system.notes:
Type: Stimulant · Strength (drug power rating, design system pg.124): +3 · Difficulty (to synthesize): 10 · Cost: 500eb · Duration: 1D6+1 minutes.

Stim increases endurance, allowing the user to stay alert for longer periods. Side effects include mental delusions.

Wiring note (Cyberpunk 2020 2nd ed. pg.122): mapped via the Effects Table (pg.124) — “Increased Endurance (+Strength to Endurance checks)” at Strength 3 → +3 to Endurance checks. The “mental delusions” side effect is GM-run prose. Addiction = universal core save (1D10 > Body Type). Manufacturer: not printed.

mechDrug.note: Stimulant: +3 to Endurance checks (Effects Table, Strength 3).
